newsletter.subject: Rain, friendship, and three easy English words for this week
newsletter.preview_text: Sing, share, and rain with Koko and Boingy, then try a simple rainy-day family activity. 親子一起用溫柔的小活動練習分享與快樂。
newsletter.hero_title: This Week in Koko's Forest: Boingy's Rainy Song
newsletter.intro: In this sweet forest story, Boingy loves to sing in the rain, but he feels lonely when no one joins him at first. Koko listens, brings a leaf umbrella, and turns a quiet rainy moment into a joyful game with friends. It is a lovely story for talking about sharing happiness, inviting others in, and finding fun on a rainy day.

learning_words.meaning: water that falls from the clouds
learning_words.example: Boingy sings a happy song in the rain.

learning_words.meaning: to let someone enjoy something with you
learning_words.example: Koko helps Boingy share the fun with friends.

learning_words.meaning: to make music with your voice
learning_words.example: The forest animals sing together in the rain.

newsletter.parent_activity: After watching, pretend it is a rainy day at home. Ask your child to open an imaginary leaf umbrella, sing one short line together, and name one way to share joy with a friend or sibling. Then say the three words together: rain, share, sing. Parent support: 看完後可以陪孩子玩一個下雨天想像遊戲，假裝撐起葉子雨傘，一起唱一句簡單旋律，再請孩子說說可以怎麼把快樂分享給朋友或手足。這樣能自然練習單字，也能延伸到同理心與分享。

newsletter.site_cta: Visit Fursay for more gentle bilingual learning ideas
newsletter.closing: Thank you for spending another cozy story time with Koko's Forest. We hope this week's rainy song brings your family a simple moment to sing, share, and enjoy being together.

htmlPreview:
Sing, share, and rain with Koko and Boingy, then try a simple rainy-day family activity. 親子一起用溫柔的小活動練習分享與快樂。

Koko's Forest · EP005

This Week in Koko's Forest: Boingy's Rainy Song

In this sweet forest story, Boingy loves to sing in the rain, but he feels lonely when no one joins him at first. Koko listens, brings a leaf umbrella, and turns a quiet rainy moment into a joyful game with friends. It is a lovely story for talking about sharing happiness, inviting others in, and finding fun on a rainy day.

Learning words

rain
rayn		 water that falls from the clouds
Boingy sings a happy song in the rain.
share
shair		 to let someone enjoy something with you
Koko helps Boingy share the fun with friends.
sing
sing		 to make music with your voice
The forest animals sing together in the rain.

Parent activity

After watching, pretend it is a rainy day at home. Ask your child to open an imaginary leaf umbrella, sing one short line together, and name one way to share joy with a friend or sibling. Then say the three words together: rain, share, sing. Parent support: 看完後可以陪孩子玩一個下雨天想像遊戲，假裝撐起葉子雨傘，一起唱一句簡單旋律，再請孩子說說可以怎麼把快樂分享給朋友或手足。這樣能自然練習單字，也能延伸到同理心與分享。

Watch Boingy's Rainy Song with Koko

Visit Fursay for more gentle bilingual learning ideas

Koko's Forest Adventure weekly pack is ready for family story time: https://fursay.com/creator/koko/newsletter
https://fursay.com/creator/koko/newsletter

Thank you for spending another cozy story time with Koko's Forest. We hope this week's rainy song brings your family a simple moment to sing, share, and enjoy being together.
richTextPreview:
Koko's Forest - EP005

This Week in Koko's Forest: Boingy's Rainy Song

In this sweet forest story, Boingy loves to sing in the rain, but he feels lonely when no one joins him at first. Koko listens, brings a leaf umbrella, and turns a quiet rainy moment into a joyful game with friends. It is a lovely story for talking about sharing happiness, inviting others in, and finding fun on a rainy day.

Learning words
rain - rayn
water that falls from the clouds
Boingy sings a happy song in the rain.

share - shair
to let someone enjoy something with you
Koko helps Boingy share the fun with friends.

sing - sing
to make music with your voice
The forest animals sing together in the rain.

Parent activity
After watching, pretend it is a rainy day at home. Ask your child to open an imaginary leaf umbrella, sing one short line together, and name one way to share joy with a friend or sibling. Then say the three words together: rain, share, sing. Parent support: 看完後可以陪孩子玩一個下雨天想像遊戲，假裝撐起葉子雨傘，一起唱一句簡單旋律，再請孩子說說可以怎麼把快樂分享給朋友或手足。這樣能自然練習單字，也能延伸到同理心與分享。
